## Pre-Decided Plan Structure (from CONTEXT.md D-09)
7 atomic tasks, each in its own PLAN.md file:

- **49-01-PLAN.md** — Register tmuxCopilotTool in src/plugin.ts (import + tool spread entry)
  - Files: src/plugin.ts
  - LOC: ~4 (import + 1 entry in tool spread at L645-665)

- **49-03-PLAN.md** — Wire co-pilot intervention / integration auto-detect

  - REQ: REQ-03 (integration factory)
  - Verify: When opencode-tmux/ vendored, integration auto-loads

- **49-04-PLAN.md** — Add BATS to .github/workflows/ci.yml
  - Files: .github/workflows/ci.yml
  - New job: BATS on ubuntu-latest, Node 22 only, continue-on-error: true
  - REQ: REQ-04 (CI integration)
  - Verify: Workflow syntax valid (use actionlint or yaml-validate)

- **49-05-PLAN.md** — Run BATS, capture output (3/3 pass evidence)

  - REQ: REQ-04 (CI evidence)
  - Verify: `bats tests/scripts/sync-fork.bats` → 3/3 pass, capture stdout to .planning/phases/49-.../49-bats-output.txt

- **49-06-PLAN.md** — Write P42-VERIFICATION + P42-UAT + P45 45-01-SUMMARY (retrospective)
  - Files: 
    - .planning/phases/42-tmux-visual-orchestration-layer-fork-extension/VERIFICATION.md
    - .planning/phases/42-tmux-visual-orchestration-layer-fork-extension/UAT.md
    - .planning/phases/45-vendor-sync-script-2026-06-01/45-01-SUMMARY.md
    - .planning/phases/45-vendor-sync-script-2026-06-01/45-UAT.md (already exists untracked, commit it)
  - REQ: REQ-05, REQ-06, REQ-07
  - Verify: All 3 files exist, follow P43/P45 templates per PATTERNS.md

- **49-07-PLAN.md** — P43 re-verification with stricter REQ-05 (runtime evidence)
  - Files: .planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/VERIFICATION.md
  - REQ: REQ-05 (re-run)
  - Verify: REQ-05 marked PASS only with concrete runtime evidence (not paperwork)

- Wave 1 (parallel): 49-01, 49-02, 49-03 (all src/plugin.ts + src/features/tmux/ changes)

- Wave 2 (parallel): 49-04, 49-06 (CI config + paperwork)
- Wave 3: 49-05 (depends on 49-04, must show CI integration evidence)

journey.content:
**compact_summary:**

You are the subagent gsd-planner. Produce executable phase plans for Phase 49.

## Context
Phase 49: tmux-e2e-completion. Closing the runtime gap for tmux by bundling all wiring fixes.

## Pre-Plan Artifacts (READ THESE FIRST)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/49-close-tmux-end-to-end-gap-register-tmux-copilot-in-src-plugi/49-SPEC.md (7 requirements)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/49-close-tmux-end-to-end-gap-register-tmux-copilot-in-src-plugi/49-CONTEXT.md (9 decisions)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/49-close-tmux-end-to-end-gap-register-tmux-copilot-in-src-plugi/49-RESEARCH.md (633 LOC)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/49-close-tmux-end-to-end-gap-register-tmux-copilot-in-src-plugi/49-PATTERNS.md (592 LOC, key analogs)

## Pre-Decided Plan Structure (from CONTEXT.md D-09)
7 atomic tasks, each in its own PLAN.md file:

- **49-01-PLAN.md** — Register tmuxCopilotTool in src/plugin.ts (import + tool spread entry)
  - Files: src/plugin.ts
  - LOC: ~4 (import + 1 entry in tool spread at L645-665)
  - REQ: REQ-01 (registration)
  - Acceptance: `grep -c "tmuxCopilot" src/plugin.ts` ≥ 2
  - Verify: `npm run typecheck && npm test -- --testPathPattern tmux-copilot`

- **49-02-PLAN.md** — Replace buildNoopForkSessionManager() with real SessionManager wiring
  - Files: src/plugin.ts:594-595
  - Change: `createTmuxEventObserver(getForkSessionManager() ?? buildNoopForkSessionManager())`
  - REQ: REQ-02 (observer wiring)
  - Verify: Typecheck passes, noop fallback retained

- **49-03-PLAN.md** — Wire co-pilot intervention / integration auto-detect
  - Files: src/features/tmux/integration.ts (D-04: existsSync-based, NOT import-based)
  - REQ: REQ-03 (integration factory)
  - Verify: When opencode-tmux/ vendored, integration auto-loads

- **49-04-PLAN.md** — Add BATS to .github/workflows/ci.yml
  - Files: .github/workflows/ci.yml
  - New job: BATS on ubuntu-latest, Node 22 only, continue-on-error: true
  - REQ: REQ-04 (CI integration)
  - Verify: Workflow syntax valid (use actionlint or yaml-validate)

- **49-05-PLAN.md** — Run BATS, capture output (3/3 pass evidence)
  - Files: tests/scripts/sync-fork.bats
  - REQ: REQ-04 (CI evidence)
  - Verify: `bats tests/scripts/sync-fork.bats` → 3/3 pass, capture stdout to .planning/phases/49-.../49-bats-output.txt

- **49-06-PLAN.md** — Write P42-VERIFICATION + P42-UAT + P45 45-01-SUMMARY (retrospective)
  - Files: 
    - .planning/phases/42-tmux-visual-orchestration-layer-fork-extension/VERIFICATION.md
    - .planning/phases/42-tmux-visual-orchestration-layer-fork-extension/UAT.md
    - .planning/phases/45-vendor-sync-script-2026-06-01/45-01-SUMMARY.md
    - .planning/phases/45-vendor-sync-script-2026-06-01/45-UAT.md (already exists untracked, commit it)
  - REQ: REQ-05, REQ-06, REQ-07
  - Verify: All 3 files exist, follow P43/P45 templates per PATTERNS.md

- **49-07-PLAN.md** — P43 re-verification with stricter REQ-05 (runtime evidence)
  - Files: .planning/phases/43-tmux-co-pilot-model-orchestrator-intervention/VERIFICATION.md
  - REQ: REQ-05 (re-run)
  - Verify: REQ-05 marked PASS only with concrete runtime evidence (not paperwork)

## Wave Grouping
- Wave 1 (parallel): 49-01, 49-02, 49-03 (all src/plugin.ts + src/features/tmux/ changes)
  - 49-01 must be FIRST (other waves depend on tmuxCopilotTool being registered)
  - 49-02 and 49-03 can run in parallel after 49-01
- Wave 2 (parallel): 49-04, 49-06 (CI config + paperwork)
- Wave 3: 49-05 (depends on 49-04, must show CI integration evidence)
- Wave 4: 49-07 (final re-verification after all wiring in place)

Actually, since these are all wiring, the simpler structure:
- Wave 1: 49-01 (must be first, registers tool)
- Wave 2 (parallel after 49-01): 49-02, 49-03, 49-04, 49-06 (independent changes)
- Wave 3: 49-05 (depends on 49-04)
- Wave 4: 49-07 (final)

## Output Format
For each 49-NN-PLAN.md, use this structure (see existing P43 43-01-PLAN.md for reference):

```yaml
---
phase: 49-tmux-e2e-completion
plan: NN
type: execute
wave: <N>
depends_on: [<list of plan ids>]
files_touched: [<list of files>]
autonomous: true
requirements_covered: [<REQ-IDs>]
---

# Plan 49-NN: <title>

## Objective
<1-2 sentences>

## Tasks
<numbered, each with: file:line reference, change description, acceptance criteria>

## Verification
<commands to run + expected output>

## Done When
<observable truth>
```

## Commit
Create each PLAN file, then a single atomic commit:
```
git add .planning/phases/49-.../49-*-PLAN.md
git commit -m "plan(49): 7 atomic plans for tmux-e2e-completion — wiring + paperwork"
```

## Return
Non-empty summary:
- List of all 7 plans created
- Wave grouping
- Any inter-plan dependencies you identified
- Any constraints from PATTERNS.md that affect planning (e.g., "tmuxCopilotTool is inline const, not factory")

CRITICAL: Write all 7 PLAN files. Do not skip. Failure to produce is not an option.
